clean_text: So usually around this time after each night we would have a you know short or a few words of advice from the Quran However, tonight, alhamdulillah, we are here to introduce myself to you, for you to introduce yourselves to me as kind of a welcoming kind of gathering. And so, seeing as that is the case, inshallah, we will have our gathering in the gymnasium after the As was mentioned with some tea and sweets and so forth, all are invited. I'd to take this opportunity to thank everyone for their very warm welcome, all of the hospitality. I'm very happy to be here. I'm actually very excited and optimistic about what the future holds for us inshallah together as a community. And I feel very blessed to be here. Oh, one more thing that I forgot to say. I got to say it. Somebody's parked in my parking spot outside. , it's a MercedesBenz. There's a big sign. It says, you know, reserved for the me. So, if that's you, please move your car. I had to park up the street. So,.

summary: This is a welcoming address from a new member or leader at the Muslim Community Center of Tucson. The speaker introduces themselves to the community and invites everyone to gather in the gymnasium after prayers to socialize over tea and sweets. The speaker expresses gratitude for the warm welcome and hospitality received, and shares optimism about the future of the community.
suggested_title: Welcome and Introduction to the Community - Muslim Community Center of Tucson
catchy_title: Welcome to Our Community: Let's Break Bread Together
